text: Testing plays a crucial role in software development. Unit tests check individual functions or components, catching errors early. Integration tests ensure that different parts of a system work together correctly, identifying issues in how modules interact. Many developers use test-driven development, where they write tests first and then build code to pass them. This approach often leads to cleaner, more reliable software. Overall, a good testing strategy gives the team greater confidence that changes and new features will not break existing functionality, making the development process smoother and more predictable.
